audit_items.proof_trace: Lines 144-146 read the real-time ERC20 balance of order.sellToken for the contract and revert with InsufficientAssetInBalance if order.sellAmount exceeds it. This is the only code path through isValidSignature — the magic-value return at L175 is unreachable unless L145's guard is satisfied. No bypass exists: the reentrancy guard (L125-127) blocks re-entry from bid(), and the sellToken must be a pre-registered auction asset (L131-134).
